WorkBreakTimePage.title: 🕒 Work & Break Schedule
WorkBreakTimePage.description: The warehouse operates with 2 shifts. Below you will find the work schedule and break times so everyone can rest and have some coffee ☕️
WorkBreakTimePage.footer: Follow break times 🕰️ to keep the warehouse running smoothly and avoid getting tired 💪

ShareAppPage.title: 📱 Share the App
ShareAppPage.description: Share the Medicine app with your coworkers! Scan the QR code or use the button below to send the app link.
ShareAppPage.shareText: Check out the Medicine app — easy barcode generation and scanning!
ShareAppPage.shareUnsupported: Your browser does not support the share feature 😕

AboutPage.title: 📦 Medicine Barcode
AboutPage.description: Medicine is a convenient app for generating barcodes. It helps quickly create, scan, and save barcodes for efficient warehouse work.
AboutPage.feature1: 🧾 Barcode generation — enter any text or item number and the app will automatically generate a barcode (CODE128).
AboutPage.feature2: 📷 Scan barcode from photo — take a picture of a scanner or box with the code and the system will automatically recognize the number. The image should contain a number in the format PK/25/04/23/0813.
AboutPage.feature3: 💾 Save results — all generated or scanned codes can be saved locally for quick access later.
AboutPage.feature4: 🕒 Break schedule — in the navigation menu, you can see work and break times so you won’t forget to rest 😄
AboutPage.step1: Go to the main page of the app.
AboutPage.step2: Enter the item number or press the camera icon to upload a photo with a barcode in the format PK/25/04/23/0813.
AboutPage.step3: Wait for the system to read the code — it will appear in the text field.
AboutPage.step4: Save the result to always have it at hand.
AboutPage.footer: The app also works offline and supports PWA — you can add it to your phone's home screen and use it like a regular app.

ControlPage.title: Control scanner
ControlPage.description: Upload a photo of the control sheet and the app will recognize employee numbers and save them locally.

HowToInstallPWA.title: What is PWA?
HowToInstallPWA.description: PWA (Progressive Web App) is an app you can install directly from the website — no need to use Google Play or App Store.
HowToInstallPWA.tip: A PWA works like a regular app: it has its own icon, works offline, and is faster than a website in the browser.
HowToInstallPWA.androidStep1: Open the app in Chrome or another Chromium-based browser (e.g., Edge).
HowToInstallPWA.androidStep2: Click ⋮ (three dots) in the top-right corner.
HowToInstallPWA.androidStep4: Confirm installation — the app will appear on your screen!
HowToInstallPWA.iosStep1: Open the app in Safari (important — only Safari supports PWA).
HowToInstallPWA.iosStep2: Click the Share icon in the bottom bar (square with arrow up).
HowToInstallPWA.iosStep3: Scroll down and choose 'Add to Home Screen'.
HowToInstallPWA.iosStep4: Give it a name and click Add.

EmptyStatus.title: List is empty
EmptyStatus.description: No codes recognized yet. Upload or take a photo of the WMS screen for the system to extract data.
EmptyStatus.footer: Tip: Hold the camera parallel to the screen. You can save the required codes to the main list; otherwise, they will be replaced during the next recognition.
